conclusion.reason: The audit has enough structure to plan writes, but not enough master_verified finish evidence to execute them safely.
conclusion.strongest_positive_finding: 807 physical missing-set candidates have exact Master Index card identity matches.
conclusion.main_blocker: Finish truth still requires human-readable/checklist evidence and master_verified promotion.
conclusion.finish_blocker_boundary: The final finish-second-source rows are classified as blocker-boundary adjudication items, not broad source-acquisition gaps.

immediate_next_non_write_work: Acquire human/checklist finish evidence for top physical recovery sets.
Rerun exact-match audit after evidence fixtures are added.
Only then generate set-specific dry-run write packages.
stop_rules_before_any_future_write: Stop if a fact is API-only.
Stop if finish truth is partial or unsupported.
Stop if source evidence gives only a general rule.
Stop if row IDs, rollback, and post-apply verification are not explicit.
Stop if identity-law, ownership, vault, or provenance impact is unresolved.

global_buckets.reason: Already verified by the current index. Monitor only unless a future drift audit finds divergence.
global_buckets.next_action: Keep Ascended Heroes proof loop as the reference pattern.

global_buckets.reason: API agreement is not master truth for finish/printing rows.
global_buckets.next_action: Acquire human-readable/checklist evidence before controlled normalization.

global_buckets.reason: Single-source evidence is not canonical truth.
Unsupported by current index is not deletion authority.
global_buckets.next_action: Run set-level proof loops with master_verified evidence before any cleanup proposal.

global_buckets.reason: Missing from Grookai is not insertion authority.
global_buckets.next_action: Only master_verified rows may enter a future controlled insertion plan.

global_buckets.reason: Name mismatch is not identity rewrite authority.
global_buckets.next_action: Resolve exact source card identity and alias policy first.

global_buckets.reason: Unmapped set rows cannot be normalized safely without source identity.
global_buckets.next_action: Use provenance recovery lanes before any repair design.

global_buckets.reason: All physical candidates matched card identity, but finish truth is not master_verified.
global_buckets.next_action: Acquire human/checklist finish evidence, then rerun exact-match feasibility.

global_buckets.reason: Pocket/digital aliases are outside English physical TCG scope.
global_buckets.next_action: Make explicit product-scope decision before any isolation/quarantine proposal.

global_buckets.reason: Marketplace IDs require source URL resolution and second-source confirmation.
No usable source set alias is available.
The source acquisition queue is still the main blocker to safe writes.
global_buckets.next_action: Prioritize human checklist evidence for high-volume physical recovery sets.

global_buckets.reason: Remaining finish-second-source rows have exact finish-label or card-number conflicts and are not promotion safe.
global_buckets.next_action: Resolve manually as finish-label/number adjudication before any future write package.

global_buckets.reason: Truth readiness ranks risk; it does not authorize writes.
global_buckets.next_action: Use only to choose next proof-loop targets.

global_buckets.reason: Repair priority is a future planning aid only.
global_buckets.next_action: Use after evidence acquisition, not before.

global_buckets.reason: Provenance recovery leads are not canonical truth.
global_buckets.next_action: Promote only through source-backed proof loops.

write_packages.name: Ascended Heroes monitor-only proof baseline
required_before_write: No write required unless future drift appears.
write_packages.rollback_requirement: Existing Ascended Heroes rollback/proof artifacts remain the model for future sets.

write_packages.name: Physical missing-set recovery
blockers: No candidate finish is currently master_verified.
Partial finish support must be split into supported-only and unsupported lanes.
Human-readable/checklist finish evidence is required before any write.
required_before_write: Acquire human/checklist evidence per set and finish.
Rerun exact-match feasibility and require master_verified finish rows.
Generate a set-specific dry-run write plan with rollback artifacts.
Founder/operator approval of exact row IDs and intended mutations.
write_packages.rollback_requirement: Per-row before/after snapshot and reversible update plan required.

write_packages.name: Pocket/digital scope isolation
blockers: Pocket/digital scope is outside English physical TCG but needs product decision.
Scope exclusion is not automatic deletion authority.
required_before_write: Decide whether Grookai stores Pocket/digital rows in a separate domain.
Verify ownership/vault/provenance impacts before any hide or move.
write_packages.rollback_requirement: Scope isolation must be reversible and cannot corrupt vault ownership.

write_packages.name: Unsupported printings cleanup
blockers: Unsupported by current index is not deletion authority.
Many sets are API-only or source-limited.
required_before_write: Run set-level proof loops until relevant facts are master_verified.
Produce proof-based unsupported row report with exact evidence URLs.
write_packages.rollback_requirement: Every cleanup row needs before-state snapshot and reasoned evidence.

write_packages.name: Missing-from-Grookai insertions
blockers: Missing from Grookai is not insertion authority.
Only master_verified index rows may participate in future insertion.
required_before_write: Promote candidate rows to master_verified using source law.
Confirm no duplicate identity or ownership side effects.
Generate controlled insertion plan and rollback/deletion companion.
write_packages.rollback_requirement: Insertion rollback must remove only inserted rows and preserve ownership ledgers.

write_packages.name: Name and alias governance
blockers: Name mismatch is not identity rewrite authority.
Alias and subset policies must be source-backed.
required_before_write: Resolve aliases with exact source URLs and evidence labels.
Separate display-name cleanup from identity mutation.
Run identity-law conflict checks before any write.
write_packages.rollback_requirement: Alias changes must be reversible and must not mutate canonical identity laws silently.
